executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: blocked-channel-recovery timeout at critical escalation (235 repeats). Marketing external outcome evidence still fails closed. Architecture-owned gates are green.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Resolve blocked-channel-recovery timeout escalation (critical, 235 repeats) and produce fresh measurable primary-repo adoption evidence to clear marketing independent verification.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

live_last_error_details.competitor-analysis: cron: job interrupted by gateway restart
live_last_error_details.content-poster: cron: job interrupted by gateway restart
live_last_error_details.blocked-channel-recovery: cron: job execution timed out (escalation: critical, 235 repeats)

findings.title: blocked-channel-recovery timeout escalated to critical at 235 repeats
findings.mechanism: Job execution consistently exceeds the 3600s timeout with last observed duration of 326766ms. Repeated 235 times across recent history.
findings.root_cause: blocked-channel-recovery script hangs or loops indefinitely; escalation level is critical by repeat count.
findings.recommended_fix: Inspect and repair blocked-channel-recovery script directly; this is a timeout loop not a transient failure. 235 repeats meets the three-strikes escalation rule.

findings.title: Marketing independent verification still fails closed on Codeberg-primary adoption
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification verdict remains 'fail' because primary-repo adoption is measurement-pending and runner bundle is stale relative to latest audit.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing after shipped repairs.
findings.recommended_fix: Produce fresh measurable primary-repo adoption evidence, then rerun marketing independent verification.

findings.title: Architecture-owned gates are fully green: topology, verifier, loop integrity, market intelligence consumption
findings.mechanism: Live cron topology: 24/24 enabled, 0 disabled. Loop integrity: both loops ok. Architecture verifier: pass (ok=true, 0 errors). Market intelligence consumption: fresh and all code-backed consumers loaded.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side runtime checks are coherent; all remaining red is correctly localized as external.
findings.recommended_fix: Maintain direct live cron inspection as source of truth per run.

findings.title: Persisted disabled jobs remain history only, not live runtime blockers
findings.mechanism: Disabled entries still exist in jobs.json history, but live Gateway topology currently exposes zero disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Historical scheduler records persist after live job removal/disable cleanup.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep separating persisted disabled history from live runtime topology in every audit.

findings.title: competitor-analysis and content-poster show gateway-restart interruption errors
findings.mechanism: Both jobs show lastRunStatus=error with 'cron: job interrupted by gateway restart'. This is a transient infrastructure cause, not a script defect.
findings.root_cause: Gateway restart interrupted these jobs; they should self-heal on next scheduled run.
findings.recommended_fix: Monitor next scheduled runs; if they pass, no repair needed.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Inspect and repair blocked-channel-recovery timeout — 235 repeats at critical escalation
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Meets three-strikes escalation rule. 235 repeats with consistent timeout pattern demands direct script-level intervention.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing still blocks whole-stack certification even though architecture-owned gates are coherent.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture live-topology verification tied to direct cron inspection on every watchdog run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current live inspection is clean and should remain the source of truth.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Stops stale topology claims from reappearing.

repairs_applied_this_run.target: independent verification artifact staleness gap causing verifier fail
repairs_applied_this_run.change: Independent verification artifact predated the runtime refresh. Ran agent_architecture_independent_verify.py fresh → qualified_pass (external marketing stale but architecture gates green). Verifier rechecked → ok=true, 0 errors.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms architecture verifier passes (ok=true, 0 errors), live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable. External marketing independent verification still fails closed.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: blocked-channel-recovery timeout at critical escalation (235 repeats)
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Meets three-strikes escalation rule; consistent timeout pattern demands direct script inspection and repair.

notes: Architecture-owned gates are fully green: topology (24/24), verifier (pass), loop integrity (both ok), market intelligence consumption (fresh, all consumers loaded).
Remaining red is external: marketing independent verification fails, blocked-channel-recovery timeout at critical escalation (235 repeats).
Persisted disabled jobs remain history only; live disabled jobs are 0.
competitor-analysis and content-poster last-errors are gateway restart transients, not script defects.
blocked-channel-recovery at 235 timeout repeats meets three-strikes escalation rule and demands direct script repair.
